name: Snicker Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix cake according to package directions.
2. Pour half of the batter into a 9 x 13-inch greased pan.
3. Bake at 350°F for 20 minutes.
4. While the cake is baking, melt caramels, butter, and milk together until smooth.
5. Pour the melted mixture over the baked portion of the cake.
6. Dot with chocolate chips and nuts.
7. Pour remaining batter on top and bake at 275°F for 20 minutes.
8. Then bake at 350°F for an additional 10 minutes.
9. Serve with whipped cream.
